overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character exploring a neon-lit cyberpunk commercial district. The character walks through a crowded pedestrian street with holographic advertisements, stops to observe a large display, then continues toward an entrance labeled 'Ebbside'.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial pedestrian street with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit commercial street, passing by storefronts and holographic displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a bag walking past the character

entered.detail: tall structure displaying rotating holographic skull and circular advertisements with pink and green neon colors
large vertical neon sign with 'THE VOLI HOTEL' text in pink and yellow
rusted metal support structures with cross beams and platforms
modern yellow chair sitting near a circular platform on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bustling neon-lit commercial street with towering holographic advertisements overhead. Industrial metal structures line the left side while a yellow lounge chair sits near a circular platform on the right. Pedestrians walk in various directions through the moderate crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: open area beneath the holographic advertisement tower

events.description: character stops walking and looks upward at the holographic advertisement tower

agents.ego_description: standing still and looking up at the large holographic display while pedestrians walk by

segments.scene_description: The character stops walking and stands still, looking up at the large holographic advertisement tower displaying colorful skull imagery. The surrounding neon signs continue to illuminate the scene as other pedestrians walk past.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to Ebbside entrance

events.description: character resumes walking forward through the crowd
character turns right toward the Ebbside entrance corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Ebbside entrance, passing a security guard standing near the doorway

notable_agents.action: security guard standing with arms crossed near the Ebbside entrance

entered.detail: pink neon sign with 'EBBSIDE' text and arrow symbols mounted above a doorway
metal doorway with red double doors leading into the Ebbside district
various posters and advertisements plastered on the industrial metal wall

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking and navigates through a narrower corridor toward the Ebbside entrance. A pink neon sign marks the doorway ahead, with a security guard standing watch to the right. The character approaches the metal doorway, leaving the main commercial plaza behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling cyberpunk commercial district that narrows into a guarded industrial entrance. It begins by trailing a character through a neon-lit street filled with towering holographic advertisements, industrial metal structures, and a moderate crowd of pedestrians. As the character pauses to look up at a large holographic tower displaying colorful skull imagery, the surrounding neon signs cast a vibrant glow over the stationary figure and the passing crowd. The scene then shifts as the character resumes walking, navigating away from the open plaza and into a narrower corridor. Finally, the camera follows them toward a metal doorway marked by a pink neon sign for Ebbside, passing a security guard standing watch at the entrance.
